description: Used to diagnose climate responses to the regionally heterogeneous evolution of anthropogenic aerosol emissions. Anthropogenic aerosols and aerosol precursor emissions (BC, OC, NH3, SO2) evolve as in `piControl`. All other forcings evolve as in `historical`. Intended for models without interactive chemistry. Models with interactive chemistry should run `hist-piAQ` instead. (Identical to `hist-piAer` in AerChemMIP phase 1.)
